parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  employee_id: $json.employee_id,
  period_start: $json.period_start,
  period_end: $json.period_end,
  gross_salary: $json.gross_salary,
  tax_deduction: $json.tax_deduction,
  social_security: $json.social_security,
  net_salary: $json.net_salary,
  payment_date: $json.payment_date,
  status: 'processed'
}) }}
